CommandText:
SELECT s1."Id" AS "SalesOrderId", s1."OrderNumber" AS "SalesOrderNumber", s1."DeliveryDate" AS "ExpectedShipmentDate", (
    SELECT COALESCE(sum(CASE
        WHEN s2."Status" = 0 THEN s2."Quantity"
        ELSE -s2."Quantity"
    END), 0.0)
    FROM "SalesOrderItems" AS s2
    WHERE s1."Id" = s2."SalesOrderId") AS "Quantity", s1."CustomerId", c0."CustomerName"
FROM (
    SELECT s."Id", s."CustomerId", s."DeliveryDate", s."OrderNumber"
    FROM "SalesOrders" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted") AND NOT (s."IsSalesOrderRequest") AND s."DeliveryStatus" = 1 AND s."LocationId" = ANY (@_userInfoToken_LocationIds) AND (
        SELECT COALESCE(sum(CASE
            WHEN s0."Status" = 0 THEN s0."Quantity"
            ELSE -s0."Quantity"
        END), 0.0)
        FROM "SalesOrderItems" AS s0
        WHERE s."Id" = s0."SalesOrderId") > 0.0
    ORDER BY s."DeliveryDate" DESC
    LIMIT @p
) AS s1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT c."Id", c."CustomerName"
    FROM "Customers" AS c
    WHERE c."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (c."IsDeleted")
) AS c0 ON s1."CustomerId" = c0."Id"
ORDER BY s1."DeliveryDate" DESC

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "ReminderSchedulers" AS r
WHERE r."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (r."IsDeleted") AND NOT (r."IsActive") AND r."UserId" = @_userInfoToken_Id AND NOT (r."IsRead")

SELECT t0."TransactionType", t0."IsPayment", COALESCE(sum(t0."TotalAmount"), 0.0) AS "TotalAmount"
FROM (
    SELECT t."TotalAmount", t."TransactionType", upper(t."Narration") LIKE '%PAYMENT%' AND t."Narration" IS NOT NULL AS "IsPayment"
    FROM "Transactions" AS t
    WHERE t."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (t."IsDeleted") AND t."TransactionDate" >= @fromDate AND t."TransactionDate" < @toDate AND t."TransactionType" IN (1, 2, 3, 4)
) AS t0
GROUP BY t0."TransactionType", t0."IsPayment"

SELECT s1."Id", s1."ContactPerson", s1."Description", s1."Fax", s1."SupplierName", s1."Website", s1."MobileNo", s1."PhoneNo", s1."Email", s2."CountryName" AS "Country"
FROM (
    SELECT s."Id", s."BillingAddressId", s."ContactPerson", s."Description", s."Email", s."Fax", s."MobileNo", s."PhoneNo", s."SupplierName", s."Website"
    FROM "Suppliers" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted")
    ORDER BY s."SupplierName"
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS s1
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT s0."Id", s0."CountryName"
    FROM "SupplierAddresses" AS s0
    WHERE s0."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s0."IsDeleted")
) AS s2 ON s1."BillingAddressId" = s2."Id"
ORDER BY s1."SupplierName"

SELECT s0."Key" AS "Month", COALESCE(sum(s0."TotalAmount"), 0.0) AS "Total"
FROM (
    SELECT s."TotalAmount", date_part('month', s."SOCreatedDate")::int AS "Key"
    FROM "SalesOrders" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted") AND date_part('year', s."SOCreatedDate")::int = @currentYear AND s."LocationId" = ANY (@locationIds) AND NOT (s."IsSalesOrderRequest")
) AS s0
GROUP BY s0."Key"

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Customers" AS c
WHERE c."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (c."IsDeleted") AND (c."SalesPersonId" = @userId OR (c."LocationId" IS NOT NULL AND c."LocationId" = ANY (@allowedLocations)))

SELECT c."Id", c."CustomerName", c."Email", c."ContactPerson", c."MobileNo", c."Website", c."IsWalkIn"
FROM "Customers" AS c
WHERE c."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (c."IsDeleted") AND (c."SalesPersonId" = @userId OR (c."LocationId" IS NOT NULL AND c."LocationId" = ANY (@allowedLocations)))
ORDER BY c."CustomerName"
LIMIT @p3 OFFSET @p

SELECT s0."Key" AS "Month", COALESCE(sum(s0."TotalAmount"), 0.0) AS "Total"
FROM (
    SELECT s."TotalAmount", date_part('month', s."SOCreatedDate")::int AS "Key"
    FROM "SalesOrders" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted") AND date_part('year', s."SOCreatedDate")::int = @currentYear AND s."LocationId" = ANY (@locationIds) AND NOT (s."IsSalesOrderRequest")
) AS s0
GROUP BY s0."Key"

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "ProductStocks" AS p
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT p0."Id", p0."AlertQuantity"
    FROM "Products" AS p0
    WHERE p0."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (p0."IsDeleted")
) AS p1 ON p."ProductId" = p1."Id"
WHERE p."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (p."IsDeleted") AND p1."AlertQuantity" IS NOT NULL AND p."CurrentStock" <= p1."AlertQuantity" AND p."LocationId" = ANY (@P_LocationIds)

SELECT count(*)::int
FROM "Suppliers" AS s
WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted")

SELECT s0."Key" AS "Month", COALESCE(sum(s0."TotalAmount"), 0.0) AS "Total"
FROM (
    SELECT s."TotalAmount", date_part('month', s."SOCreatedDate")::int AS "Key"
    FROM "SalesOrders" AS s
    WHERE s."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (s."IsDeleted") AND date_part('year', s."SOCreatedDate")::int = @lastYear AND s."LocationId" = ANY (@locationIds) AND NOT (s."IsSalesOrderRequest")
) AS s0
GROUP BY s0."Key"

SELECT u."Id", u."Name", u."ParentId", CASE
    WHEN u1."Id" IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(u1."Name", '') || '(' || COALESCE(u1."Code", '') || ')'
    ELSE ''
END AS "BaseUnitName", u."Value", u."Operator", u."Code"
FROM "UnitConversations" AS u
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT u0."Id", u0."Code", u0."Name"
    FROM "UnitConversations" AS u0
    WHERE u0."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (u0."IsDeleted")
) AS u1 ON u."ParentId" = u1."Id"
WHERE u."TenantId" = @ef_filter__CurrentTenantId AND NOT (u."IsDeleted")
ORDER BY u."Name"
